summary: The test suite provides solid, well-organized coverage of the core New-BuildMatrix function across all major requirements: cross-product generation, include/exclude rules, fail-fast, max-parallel, size validation, file-based config, and JSON round-tripping. BDD structure with Describe/Context/It is used consistently, test cases are independent, TestDrive is used correctly for temp files, and error-condition tests are present. However, several gaps reduce confidence: (1) The task explicitly required workflow YAML structure tests (triggers, job steps, path verification, actionlint exit-code assertion) — none are present in this suite. (2) The file-not-found error path (implemented in the script) is never tested. (3) No boundary-condition test at exactly the 256-combination limit. (4) Empty include/exclude arrays are not tested as edge cases. (5) The CLI entrypoint mode is untested. (6) The 'cross-product' test titles are slightly misleading — tests only assert dimension arrays exist, not that actual combinations are enumerated correctly (acceptable given GitHub Actions format, but the naming could cause confusion). The design is clean and readable, though some repetitive config-hashtable construction across tests could be extracted into helper fixtures.
